name: glm-test-engineer
description: AI-powered test engineering agent for creating, reviewing, and improving test strategies and test cases

plugins.name: glm-test-engineer
plugins.description: AI-powered test engineering agent that analyzes your codebase, detects project type and test framework, then generates comprehensive test strategies with security checklists, performance benchmarks, and risk-based prioritization. Supports REST API, GraphQL, Web, Mobile, and Microservices testing.
